name: WhatsApp Business

composio_registry_match.name: WhatsApp
composio_registry_match.description: Enables interaction with customers through the WhatsApp Business API for messaging and automation. Only supports WhatsApp Business accounts, not WhatsApp Personal accounts.

description: Enterprise-grade API platform for businesses to send and receive WhatsApp messages, manage contacts, and facilitate customer communications.
notes: While the doc snippet shows Bearer token auth, Meta's broader Graph API platform natively uses OAuth2 for app-level permissions, consistent with Composio's registry. [human-verified: System User Token via Meta Business Suite. Free tier 1000 conversations/month. Self-serve with Meta developer account.]
